name: discord-bugbot
description: Deployable Discord bot for FAQ auto-replies and GitHub issue/PR linking.
author: SparkBugz

scripts.start:bot:keychain: DISCORD_TOKEN="$(llm-secret get discord-bugbot/DISCORD_TOKEN)" DISCORD_OAUTH_CLIENT_SECRET="$(llm-secret get discord-bugbot/DISCORD_OAUTH_CLIENT_SECRET)" node src/index.js
scripts.start:panel:keychain: DISCORD_TOKEN="$(llm-secret get discord-bugbot/DISCORD_TOKEN)" DISCORD_OAUTH_CLIENT_SECRET="$(llm-secret get discord-bugbot/DISCORD_OAUTH_CLIENT_SECRET)" node src/panelMain.js
